index.subhead: Short, honest lessons on the financial system — written for people the system wasn't built for.
index.footerLine: More lessons coming. We ship one every few months — slowly, carefully, properly written.

compoundInterest.cardDescription: The math the banks have been using for centuries. Now it's your turn.

inflation.title: Inflation: The Silent Tax
inflation.description: Why your money loses ground every year — and what to do about it.

savingsVsInvesting.title: Savings vs. Investing
savingsVsInvesting.description: They sound similar. They aren't. Here's where the difference shows up.

currencyDepreciation.title: Currency Depreciation
currencyDepreciation.description: When holding your local money is the bigger risk than not investing.
